articles.title: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 10 Nisan 2026
articles.title_tr: Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler 10 Nisan 2026
articles.summary: Son depremler... Son dakika deprem mi oldu? Az önce deprem nerede oldu? İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir ve il il AFAD son depremler.. 10 Nisan 2026 deprem son dakika haberleri haberin detayında... Artçı deprem mi oldu? Son deprem büyüklüğü ne kadar? Yakınımdaki depremler nelerdir? Anlık deprem mi oldu? Son dakika canlı deprem Türkiye haritası.. Kandilli Rasathanesi ve Deprem Araştırma Enstitüsü ve AFAD deprem haberleri.. İstanbul'da deprem mi oldu? Ankara'da deprem mi oldu? İzmir'de deprem mi oldu? Hangi illerde deprem oldu ve hissedildi? Bugün deprem mi oldu? Deprem ne zaman ve kaç şiddetinde oldu? En son hangi bölgede deprem oldu? Deprem haberleriyle ilgili en çok merak edilenlerin cevabı haberde..

articles.title: İspanya'dan İsrail'e sert tepki: Hepiniz mahkeme önüne çıkacaksınız
articles.title_tr: İspanya'dan İsrail'e sert tepki: Hepiniz mahkeme önüne çıkacaksınız
articles.summary: İspanya hükümeti, İsrail Başbakanı Binyamin Netanyahu'nun tehditlerine ve İspanyol temsilcileri askeri koordinasyon merkezinden çıkarma kararına sert tepki gösterdi. İspanya Başbakan Yardımcısı Yolanda Diaz, "Savaş suçlularına karşı tam düşmanlık" ifadesini kullanırken; Gençlik ve Çocukluk Bakanı Sira Rego, İsrail yönetimini "soykırımcı rejim" olarak tanımlayarak, sorumluların Uluslararası Ceza Mahkemesi önünde hesap vereceğini vurguladı.

articles.title: Attack on Titan Studio to Redraw Opening of Latest Anime Series After Investigation Reveals Gen AI Usage, Apologizes to Fans
articles.title_tr: Attack on Titan Studio to Redraw Opening of Latest Anime Series After Investigation Reveals Gen AI Usage, Apologizes to Fans
articles.summary: Wit Studio has apologized after confirming fan suspicions that generative AI was used in the opening of Season 4 of its latest anime, Ascendance of a Bookworm. The studio, known for popular shows including Spy x Family and Attack on Titan (Seasons 1-3), has announced that future episodes of Ascendance of a Bookworm will feature a redrawn opening with the gen AI elements removed.
articles.summary_tr: Wit Studio has apologized after confirming fan suspicions that generative AI was used in the opening of Season 4 of its latest anime, Ascendance of a Bookworm. The studio, known for popular shows including Spy x Family and Attack on Titan (Seasons 1-3), has announced that future episodes of Ascendance of a Bookworm will feature a redrawn opening with the gen AI elements removed.

articles.title: After Years Of Nintendo Exclusivity, This Beloved Puzzle Franchise Is Going Multiplatform
articles.title_tr: After Years Of Nintendo Exclusivity, This Beloved Puzzle Franchise Is Going Multiplatform
articles.summary: Several years have passed since Professor Layton and the New World of Steam was first revealed, but at long last, developer Level-5 has lifted the lid on its long-in-development puzzle-solving game. A new trailer has provided a detailed look at the game and a release date window of 2026, but the biggest surprise is that the mystery-solving Professor will be looking to crack his latest case on more than just Nintendo hardware, as Professor Layton and the New World of Steam is also coming to PC--for Steam, of course--and PS5.Previously confirmed for Switch consoles, this will be the first time that a Professor Layton game has been released on a non-Nintendo console and on PC. The series kicked off on Nintendo DS in 2008 and has continued on 3DS and Switch consoles since then, and while there have also been iOS and Android ports, those aren't technically considered to be consoles--and as well all know, technically correct is the best kind of correct.          Beyond that, the trailer also showed off the game's new art direction, which blends the traditional look of the series with 3D-animated visuals. We also got a closer look at Steam Bison, a US town fueled by invention and full of steampunk technology. On Switch 2, the game will offer mouse support, and Level-5 says that players can expect to meet a colorful cast of characters while working to solve the mystery that lies at the heart of Steam Bison.Continue Reading at GameSpot
articles.summary_tr: Several years have passed since Professor Layton and the New World of Steam was first revealed, but at long last, developer Level-5 has lifted the lid on its long-in-development puzzle-solving game. A new trailer has provided a detailed look at the game and a release date window of 2026, but the biggest surprise is that the mystery-solving Professor will be looking to crack his latest case on more than just Nintendo hardware, as Professor Layton and the New World of Steam is also coming to PC--for Steam, of course--and PS5.Previously confirmed for Switch consoles, this will be the first time that a Professor Layton game has been released on a non-Nintendo console and on PC. The series kicked off on Nintendo DS in 2008 and has continued on 3DS and Switch consoles since then, and while there have also been iOS and Android ports, those aren't technically considered to be consoles--and as well all know, technically correct is the best kind of correct.          Beyond that, the trailer also showed off the game's new art direction, which blends the traditional look of the series with 3D-animated visuals. We also got a closer look at Steam Bison, a US town fueled by invention and full of steampunk technology. On Switch 2, the game will offer mouse support, and Level-5 says that players can expect to meet a colorful cast of characters while working to solve the mystery that lies at the heart of Steam Bison.Continue Reading at GameSpot

A new trailer has provided a detailed look at the game and a release date window of 2026, but the biggest surprise is that the mystery-solving Professor will be looking to crack his latest case on more than just Nintendo hardware, as Professor Layton and the New World of Steam is also coming to

articles.title: Erdoğan: Hitler'in politikalarıyla İsrail'in kararları arasında fark yoktur
articles.title_tr: Erdoğan: Hitler'in politikalarıyla İsrail'in kararları arasında fark yoktur
articles.summary: Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, ICAPP Kadın Kolu heyetini kabulünde yaptığı konuşmada, İsrail'in Filistin politikalarına sert tepki gösterdi. Hitler'in Yahudilere yönelik canavarca politikaları ile İsrail parlamentosunun aldığı kararlar arasında özü itibarıyla bir fark olmadığını vurgulayan Erdoğan, Ortadoğu'nun son yıllarda sancılı ve karanlık günler yaşadığını, savaşların yükünü ise en çok kadın ve çocukların çektiğini ifade etti.

articles.title: PUBG Dev On Highguard And Concord Struggles: It's "Really Hard To Succeed Every Time"
articles.title_tr: PUBG Dev On Highguard And Concord Struggles: It's "Really Hard To Succeed Every Time"
articles.summary: PUBG franchise director Taeseok Jang has reflected on the string of shortcomings in the live-service multiplayer space, including high-profile examples like Concord and Highguard. He said in an interview that he has friends who worked on those games, and has tried to learn lessons from their struggles.Jang told GamesRadar that it is "really hard to succeed every time," and for Concord and Highguard, he said he is trying put himself in the developers' shoes and think, "'What could I have done better in that situation?'"He said he would "try to have that perspective, and try to learn from it."Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: JBL BandBox Trio practice amplifier review: A party speaker for musicians, not just music
articles.title_tr: JBL BandBox Trio practice amplifier review: A party speaker for musicians, not just music
articles.summary:
The JBL BandBox Trio mixes a battery-powered guitar amp, party speaker, and karaoke box into one surprisingly useful smart practice rig—just don’t expect full-size amp power or deep-modeler tone.
The post JBL BandBox Trio practice amplifier review: A party speaker for musicians, not just music appeared first on Popular Science.

articles.title: Işıkhan duyurdu: 1 milyar euroluk kaynakla 1 milyon 200 bin kişiye ulaşıldı
articles.title_tr: Işıkhan duyurdu: 1 milyar euroluk kaynakla 1 milyon 200 bin kişiye ulaşıldı
articles.summary: Çalışma ve Sosyal Güvenlik Bakanı Vedat Işıkhan, Mardin'de katıldığı programda Türkiye ile Avrupa Birliği arasındaki mali iş birliği projelerinin sonuçlarını açıkladı. Yaklaşık 1 milyar euroluk finansmanla 75 ilde 1200'ün üzerinde projenin hayata geçirildiğini belirten Işıkhan, bu projelerle 1 milyon 200 bini aşkın vatandaşın eğitim, istihdam ve sosyal hizmet imkanlarından yararlandığını bildirdi.
articles.summary_tr: Çalışma ve Sosyal Güvenlik Bakanı Vedat Işıkhan, Mardin'de katıldığı programda Türkiye ile Avrupa Birliği arasındaki mali iş birliği projelerinin sonuçlarını açıkladı. articles.title: Avrupa borsaları karışık seyirle kapandı
articles.title_tr: Avrupa borsaları karışık seyirle kapandı
articles.summary: Avrupa borsaları, haftanın son işlem gününde karışık seyirle kapandı. Kapanışta gösterge endeks Stoxx Europe 600 yüzde 0,37 değer kazanarak 614,84 puana geriledi.
articles.summary_tr: Avrupa borsaları, haftanın son işlem gününde karışık seyirle kapandı. Kapanışta gösterge endeks Stoxx Europe 600 yüzde 0,37 değer kazanarak 614,84 puana geriledi.
